title: wasm: NieClient::connect does not close existing connection before replacing it
description: NieClient::connect (api.rs:146-166) replaces the inner client if called a second time, but WasmTransport has no Drop impl, so the old WebSocket is not closed — it's simply leaked to the JS GC. Two concurrent connections to the relay from the same identity result; the relay will see a duplicate authentication from the same pub_id. The relay may or may not handle this correctly. The correct behavior is to call close() on the old client before replacing it.
